name: Blue Ribbon French Toast (Star 11/23/92)
recipeIngredient: 8 Slices firm bread, white or wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs, flour, milk, baking powder, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Place bread slices into the mixture, ensuring both sides are coated.
3. Cook on a griddle or skillet using oil, margarine, or butter until golden brown on one side.
4. Turn the bread slices and cook until golden brown on the second side.
5. Serve with syrup or confectioners sugar.
